_comment: LifeTrac v25 AES-128-GCM golden vectors. Generated with cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead.AESGCM and committed verbatim so the firmware-side host build (firmware/bench/crypto_vectors/host_check.c) can byte-compare its mbedtls/rweather output against the same Python reference. All values are lowercase hex; tag is the 16-byte GCM tag concatenated to the ciphertext per lp_encrypt's output layout.
_columns: key(16) | nonce(12) | aad(0) | plaintext | ciphertext | tag
_aad_note: LifeTrac frames pass NULL/0-len AAD to mbedtls_gcm_crypt_and_tag (see lp_crypto_real.cpp). All vectors here mirror that: AAD is the empty string.

name: control_frame_typical
_note: ct/tag for this synthetic LifeTrac frame are filled in by the test on first run via lp_encrypt and compared with the Python AESGCM reference; see test_crypto_vectors.py.
